title: RVDiA | Revolutionary Virtual Discord Assistant
hero_subtitle: Your Indonesian-oriented Multipurpose Discord Bot with rich RPG elements, music, and an immersive dream world.
feature_1_desc: Powered by Gemini for smart, natural, and human-like conversations.
feature_2_desc: Embark on an epic journey in 'Revolution ~ The Dream World'.
feature_3_desc: From moderation to fetching the latest weather, RVDiA has it all.
commands_subtitle: Here is the list of dynamically fetched commands you can use with RVDiA.
privacy_content: We respect your privacy. RVDiA only collects the necessary Discord data (such as User IDs) required for our RPG system, economy, and command functionality. We do not sell your data.
terms_content: By inviting RVDiA to your server, you agree not to abuse the bot's services. Do not use the bot for malicious intent, spamming, or violating Discord's Terms of Service.
